data.name: StatusReady
data.value: Click "Scan" to analyze C drive for cleanup

data.name: StatusComplete
data.value: Scan complete! {0} categories selected, {1} files found

data.name: TipAdmin
data.value: Run as administrator for best results

data.name: TipExpand
data.value: Click category to expand file details | Click file to open in Explorer

data.name: SafetyTip
data.value: Safety notice: File cleanup is irreversible. Please back up important data before proceeding.

data.name: Cleaner_SystemTemp_Desc
data.value: Temporary files in Windows system and user temp folders

data.name: Cleaner_RecycleBin_Desc
data.value: Empty the Recycle Bin on all drives

data.name: Cleaner_BrowserCache_Desc
data.value: Cache files from Chrome, Edge, and Firefox browsers

data.name: Cleaner_WinUpdate_Desc
data.value: Windows Update download packages, safe to delete after installation

data.name: Cleaner_Prefetch_Desc
data.value: Windows Prefetch files used to speed up program launches

data.name: Cleaner_LogFiles_Desc
data.value: Old log files in Windows Logs directory (.log/.etl etc.)

data.name: Cleaner_MemoryDump_Desc
data.value: System crash memory dump files, can be several GB each

data.name: Cleaner_DeliveryOpt_Desc
data.value: Windows Update cache shared with other PCs on the local network

data.name: Cleaner_ErrorReport_Desc
data.value: Windows Error Reporting crash dumps and logs

data.name: Cleaner_WinOld_Desc
data.value: C:\Windows.old backup from a major Windows upgrade

data.name: Cleaner_WeChat_Desc
data.value: WeChat and WeCom chat images, videos, and file caches

data.name: Cleaner_QQ_Desc
data.value: QQ group chat image and video caches

data.name: Cleaner_NuGet_Desc
data.value: Old NuGet package versions for .NET developers, can be re-downloaded

data.name: Cleaner_LargeFiles_Desc
data.value: Find files larger than 100MB on C drive for manual review

data.name: Cleaner_Duplicates_Desc
data.value: Find duplicate files by content hash for manual review

data.name: Cleaner_EmptyFolders_Desc
data.value: Find empty directories on C drive (display only, no auto-cleanup)

data.name: Msg_SelectCategory
data.value: Please select at least one category to scan.

data.name: Msg_CannotUndo
data.value: About to clean {0} categories. This cannot be undone.

data.name: Msg_ConfirmContinue
data.value: Are you sure you want to continue?

data.name: Msg_ScanComplete
data.value: Scan complete! {0} categories selected, {1} files found

data.name: Msg_AdminHint
data.value: Tip: Some files may require administrator privileges. Try running as administrator.
